about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: Preserving Latvian Heritage Through Fashion
about.intro: GERBONI was born from a deep love for Latvian culture and a desire to share its rich heraldic traditions with the world.
about.missionText: We believe that every Latvian city has a unique story to tell, beautifully captured in its coat of arms. Our mission is to bring these symbols of local pride and history to life through high-quality, wearable art.
about.qualityText: Each GERBONI t-shirt is crafted from 100% organic cotton, ethically sourced and printed using eco-friendly techniques. We partner with local artisans to ensure every design meets the highest standards of heraldic accuracy.
about.heritageText: From Riga's iconic crossed keys to Liepāja's majestic lion, each coat of arms represents centuries of history, culture, and community pride. When you wear GERBONI, you're not just wearing a t-shirt – you're carrying a piece of Latvian heritage.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our products and services

shipping.title: Shipping & Delivery
shipping.a1: Standard shipping within Latvia takes 2-3 business days. Baltic states delivery takes 3-5 business days. EU shipping takes 5-10 business days.
shipping.a2: Yes! We ship to all EU countries. Shipping costs and delivery times vary by destination.
shipping.a3: We offer free shipping on orders over €50 within the Baltic states.

orders.title: Orders & Returns
orders.q1: Can I modify my order after placing it?
orders.a1: Please contact us within 1 hour of placing your order. Once processing begins, we cannot make changes.
orders.a2: We accept returns within 30 days of delivery. Items must be unworn, unwashed, and in original packaging.
orders.q3: How do I track my order?
orders.a3: Once shipped, you'll receive a tracking number via email. You can also track orders in your account.

products.title: Products & Care
products.q1: What material are the t-shirts made of?
products.a1: Our t-shirts are made from 100% organic cotton, pre-shrunk and garment-dyed for lasting comfort.
products.q2: How should I care for my t-shirt?
products.a2: Machine wash cold, inside out. Tumble dry low or hang to dry. Do not bleach or iron directly on the print.
products.a3: Our designs are inspired by historical coats of arms and created in collaboration with local historians.

shipping.title: Shipping Information
shipping.subtitle: Fast, reliable delivery to your door
shipping.processingText: Orders are typically processed within 1-2 business days. During peak seasons, processing may take longer.
shipping.trackingText: All orders include tracking. You'll receive a tracking number via email once your order ships.

policy.title: Return Policy
policy.text: We want you to love your GERBONI purchase. If you're not completely satisfied, you can return items within 30 days of delivery.
policy.condition1: Items must be unworn and unwashed
policy.condition3: Items must be in original packaging

process.title: How to Return
process.step1: Contact our support team to initiate a return
process.step3: Pack items securely and drop off at any post office
process.step4: Refund processed within 5-7 business days of receipt

exchanges.title: Exchanges
exchanges.text: Want a different size or color? Contact us and we'll help arrange an exchange.
